dict.string: Lewis & Short, A Latin Dictionary (1879): text provided under a CC BY-SA 4.0 license by Perseus Digital Library, http://www.perseus.tufts.edu, with funding from The National Endowment for the Humanities; data accessed from https://github.com/PerseusDL/lexica/. Morphology: Perseus/Morpheus via Diogenes. Synonyms: Ramshorn, Dictionary of Latin Synonymes, tr. Lieber (1841), public domain. Curated by Jónatan Sólon.
